original_name: Open Singles Net Open Doubles Net
rationale: Discipline name is a corrupt merge of two labels. Participant structure is doubles-shaped: 10 placements each with two rows. participant_order=2 rows carry person_ids and clean names; participant_order=1 rows carry embedded-ordinal artifacts. HOWEVER: Teppo Harju (pid 59947054) appears at both placement 6 and placement 15 in the resolved winner list — a structural anomaly that blocks safe activation. Remains inactive until source confirmation resolves the duplicate-person issue and clarifies whether this was truly a singles event.
Discipline named Footbag Net: Singles but tagged team_type=doubles. Companion discipline Footbag Net: Doubles exists in same event. All ghost partners removed on retag.
